positive: A minimalist, stylized vector illustration featuring a graceful mountain lion silhouette leaping over a stylized stream. The design should employ bold, flat graphic shapes and geometric elements, creating a sense of dynamic movement and freedom. The background should be simple and monochromatic, allowing the central wildlife subject to pop. Use a limited, earthy color palette (deep indigo, burnt orange, sage green, and cream) with sharp contrast. The overall composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing. Art style: Modern folk art meets mid-century modern graphic design, clean lines, high contrast, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low detail, blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, out of frame, gradient, grayscale
